use_cases: Primary action trigger in forms and application interfaces with multiple visual variants
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar and navigation contexts
Destructive action confirmation with distinct warning styling
Loading state presentation with integrated spinner animation
Responsive button sizing across mobile and desktop breakpoints
ai_summary: A versatile button component built on Radix UI Slot with CVA-driven variant system supporting multiple visual styles, sizes, and states. Features responsive design with mobile/desktop variants, built-in focus ring accessibility, loading spinner integration via Lucide icons, and disabled state handling. Includes default, destructive, and outline variants with icon size accommodations and rounded-lg aesthetic.
